examples: I never understood why he didn't just accede to our demands at the outset.
Her drive to stay consistent will prompt her to accede to your request and bring a main dish.
At present, a male royal heir would always accede to the throne ahead of an older sister.
The Obama administration's insistence that Senators accede to his efforts to relegate them to rubber-stamps is without precedent.
But the police didn't accede to the family's request for the FBI to be given oversight over the probe.
